label_verbatim: [ ] Mark box only if applicable. This is a professional limited liability partnership* formed pursuant to 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A
rationale: Boolean elect-in for professional LLP status under 13 MRSA Chapter 22-A. Reuses the existing key family (entity.is_professional_lllp on MLPA-6 / entity.is_professional_llp on this form is the LLP analog).
Free-text description of professional services. Required when entity.is_professional_llp is true. Reuses the existing key from MLPA-6.

label_verbatim: FIRST: The name of the registered limited liability partnership is
rationale: Domestic-LLP name; must contain 'Limited Liability Partnership', 'L.L.P.', or 'LLP' per 31 MRSA §803-A.
Maine SOS Commercial Registered Agent (CRA) public number. Used only when registered_agent.type='commercial'.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; enum_select value 'commercial'.
Name of the registered agent (commercial path). Filler convention: write registered_agent.name to whichever slot (Text4 or Text5) matches the selected registered_agent.type.
Name of the registered agent (noncommercial path).
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0; enum_select value 'noncommercial'.

label_verbatim: (physical location, not P.O. Box – street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Physical-location address of the registered agent (single combined widget; not split into street/city components).
Optional mailing address of the registered agent.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The name and business, residence or mailing address of the contact partner is: (inline combined widget)
rationale: Inline combined name+address widget for the FOURTH-recital contact partner (single line). Distinct from the Name/Address split widgets (Text9/Text10) below — the form provides two parallel ways to capture the same information. Combined-recital pattern parallels merger.surviving_entity.name_and_jurisdiction (MBCA-10) — synth derives by concatenating contact_partner.name + ', ' + contact_partner.address at fill time.
Name portion of the contact partner (split-column widget). Reuses the existing key from MLLP-6A.
Address portion of the contact partner. Reuses the existing key from MLLP-6A.

label_verbatim: FIFTH: Other provisions of this certificate, if any, that the partners determine to include are set forth in Exhibit ___ attached hereto and made a part hereof.
rationale: Inline exhibit-letter for additional provisions of the certificate. Reuses the existing key from MBCA-6 / MLPA-6 / MLLP-6A.
Signing date of the certificate.

Printed name of individual partner signer slot 1 — Shape B (name only, no capacity field) variant of the multi-slot per-officer pattern. Distinct from MLLP-6A's partner_N.printed_name_and_capacity (Shape D) — MLLP-6 uses '(type or print name)' only because the certificate is a §822 formation/qualification filing where the role 'partner' is implicit (not an arbitrary capacity that must be disclosed).
Printed name of individual partner signer slot 2.
Printed name of individual partner signer slot 3.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)** which are Entities — slot 1 — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of an entity partner (slot 1). Reuses the existing key family from MLLP-6A — partner_entity_N.* parallels MLPA-6's general_partner_entity_N.* but uses 'partner' for LLP terminology.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)** which are Entities — slot 1 — By ___ (authorized signature) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of entity-partner slot 1.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)** which are Entities — slot 2 — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of entity partner (slot 2).

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)** which are Entities — slot 2 — By ___ / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of entity-partner slot 2.

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)** which are Entities — slot 3 — Name of Entity
rationale: Name of entity partner (slot 3).

label_verbatim: For Partner(s)** which are Entities — slot 3 — By ___ / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity of the natural person signing on behalf of entity-partner slot 3.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [2]
rationale: Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'.
Total fees ($175 base per page-0 'Filing Fee $175.00' header plus expedite premium).
Filing-contact name.
Filing-contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email.
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined.
